en: He took a call from Naomi Pierce. Dad. Roman.
ko: 그는 나오미 피어스에게 전화를 받았다. 아빠. 로만.

en: Then what's this call from today? Why are you talking to her? Come on, man.
ko: 그럼 오늘 전화는 뭐야? 왜 그녀와 이야기하고 있어? 제발.

en: I wasn't trying to fuck the deal.
I was trying to land the deal. I was trying to help.
ko: 나는 거래를 성사시키려던 거였어. 도와주고 싶었어.

en: I thought it would be a nice surprise. Roman.
ko: 좋은 서프라이즈가 될 거라고 생각했어. 로만.

en: You're a moron. Bore on the floor?
I am not a moron, Dad.
How much is a gallon of milk? What?
How much is a gallon of milk? I don't know. I mean, who the fuck knows, Dad? Literally, no one knows.
ko: 우유 1갤런 가격이 얼마냐고? 모르겠어. 누가 아냐, 아빠? 진짜로, 아무도 몰라.

en: How much is a gallon of milk?
